- Localization code/tests: `src/core/localization/srpg_localization.gd`, `tests/unit/localization/localization_test.gd`

- Credits spec/audit: `design/ux/credits.md`, `design/ux/credits-screen.md`

## Test Summary

| Story | Type | Gate | Required evidence | Current evidence / action |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| LOC-001 UI string migration | Logic + UI | BLOCKING + ADVISORY | Key parity, display_text coverage, player-facing UI refresh | `tests/unit/localization/localization_test.gd`; `tests/integration/ui/main_menu_localization_credits_test.gd`; manual visual queue if screenshots are needed |
| LOC-002 Language switch UI | UI + Integration | ADVISORY + BLOCKING | Language button changes current screen without restart | `tests/integration/ui/main_menu_localization_credits_test.gd` |
| LOC-003 Locale persistence | Integration | BLOCKING | Save/load preserves selected locale | `tests/unit/localization/localization_test.gd`; `src/core/save/save_data.gd`; `src/core/save/save_manager.gd` |
| REL-001 In-game Credits screen | UI + Compliance | ADVISORY + BLOCKING | Route reachable and required attribution text visible | `tests/integration/ui/main_menu_localization_credits_test.gd`; `design/ux/credits-screen.md` |
| REL-002 Credits/localization gate | Integration | BLOCKING | Automated key parity and credits route pass | `tests/unit/localization/localization_test.gd`; `tests/integration/ui/main_menu_localization_credits_test.gd` |
| GOV-001 Sprint/Epic status sync | Documentation | ADVISORY | Sprint status and epic index no longer stale | `production/sprint-status.yaml`; `production/epics/index.md` |

| ADR-008 Resource economy decision | Documentation | ADVISORY | Decision record exists and is accepted before implementation | `docs/architecture/ADR-008-resource-economy-upgrade.md` |

## Blocking Automated Plan

- Run Godot parse: `GodotExe --headless --check-only project.godot`
- Run GUT scene runner: `GodotExe --headless res://tests/test_runner.tscn`
- Run Windows export if release validation is requested by the sprint gate.
- Run packaged smoke: `builds/windows/SRPG.exe --headless --srpg-playthrough-smoke`

## Compliance Checks

- Kevin MacLeod / Creative Commons / OFL proper names must remain visible in Credits and must not be ordinary localized prose that can be translated away.
- `zh_CN` and `en_US` key parity must stay symmetric; missing keys are blocking for LOC-001/REL-002.
- Debug strings, data IDs, and internal resource names are allowed exceptions only when the exception list is explicit.

## Acceptance Risks

- Sprint-005 closed scope by creating readiness artifacts, not by implementing Ch.3/Bond/Fog/Base full runtime. Future plans must not treat readiness as runtime completion.
- ADR-008/009 acceptance is a prerequisite for Sprint-006 economy/equipment implementation.
- Credits wording is legally sensitive; changes require rerunning `main_menu_localization_credits_test.gd`.

## Next Steps

- Before public release, rerun the Credits route test and packaged smoke on the final build.
- Sprint-006 should consume this plan by adding Bond/equipment/base-specific tests rather than expanding Sprint-005 after closure.
